lines: What time is it in our village, {player}?
Routines help us know what's coming next in our day.
Time flies when you're having fun with friends, {player}!
no_quest_line: You're a master of your daily routine, {player}!
quest_offer_line: The village clocks are acting silly. Will you help me set them right, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Tick-tock, tick-tock! You're getting the hang of it, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Perfect timing! Now the whole village knows exactly what to do. Thank you, {player}.
